bodies.notes: decimated to 16 parametric CONTROL sections (from 45 measured stations; support-function interp error <= 0.30; measured cost curve: 28 sections @ IoU 0.9809 / ~14 @ 0.9714 / ~10 @ 0.9615 — 0.30 chosen per the parametric-preferred policy) — semantic form: vectorized zone-named stations (hull-loft kept — the taper is real), cuts/adds grouped into hinge_cuts/tendon_cuts/tendon_details modules; exact values unchanged from plan_v1. Body-level named params unavailable (multi-body plan; emitter restriction).
